status.description: COMPLETED = all acceptance criteria met; PARTIAL = some work landed but criteria remain unmet; BLOCKED = could not proceed without input.

summary.description: One paragraph: what was implemented, the approach taken, and anything the reviewer should look at first.

changes.description: Every file touched. Must match the actual working-tree diff — the caller cross-checks.

summary.description: What changed in this file and why.

commands_run.description: Verification commands executed (tests, build, lint) and how they ended. Empty array if none were run.

outcome.description: skipped = attempted but could not run (e.g. network off, missing dep); explain in detail.

detail.description: Failure output or skip reason; null when it simply passed.

open_items.description: Anything unresolved: questions, blockers, out-of-scope needs discovered mid-task, follow-ups. Empty array if none.

detail.description: What it is and what's needed to resolve it.
